ball_event: out Caught by Ravi Bishnoi!! This has been the problem with Abhishek Sharma in recent times. He has been throwing his wicket away in his quest to get going on the first ball. Advances down the wicket to have a go at Jofra Archer and slashes away from his body against this short ball. A thick top edge is induced towards third man and Bishnoi in the deep completes a safe catch. Not a great start for Sunrisers who have lost a wicket off the first ball. That's the sixth wicket of the season for Archer. Does the job again for the Rajasthan Royals. Abhishek Sharma c Ravi Bishnoi b Jofra Archer 0(1)
event_info: out Caught by Ravi Bishnoi!! This has been the problem with Abhishek Sharma in recent times. He has been throwing his wicket away in his quest to get going on the first ball. Advances down the wicket to have a go at Jofra Archer and slashes away from his body against this short ball. A thick top edge is induced towards third man and Bishnoi in the deep completes a safe catch. Not a great start for Sunrisers who have lost a wicket off the first ball. That's the sixth wicket of the season for Archer. Does the job again for the Rajasthan Royals. Abhishek Sharma c Ravi Bishnoi b Jofra Archer 0(1)
back of a length outside off; shaping away from the batter; Ishan Kishan has a look and lets it through to the keeper
defended into the off-side by Ishan Kishan
drifting on the pads; Ishan Kishan flicks this over mid-wicket for a couple of runs. That was in the air for a while; but landed beyond the circle
short and quick outside off; some extra pace and bounce as it was bowled at 146 clicks; Ishan Kishan gets surprised due to the pace and bounce; gets it off the splice of his at towards point

good length delivery around off; Ishan Kishan knocks it into the off-side from within the crease. A superb over by Jofra Archer who concedes only a couple of runs in his opening over; apart from Sharma's wicket on the first ball
short and quick on leg; some nice pace and bounce; Travis Head looks to tuck it away; it clips his thigh pad and rolls towards the on-side. Kishan wanted a single; but was sent back by Head
fraction short around off; Travis Head taps it into the off-side
short and quick around middle and leg; shapes back in sharply; Travis Head has a swing and a miss
good shot! Back of a length delivery around off; Travis Head makes room and smashes it over covers to open his account
slapped towards mid-off as the bowler goes tad short
full and quick on off; driven towards cover by Travis Head
back of a length delivery around middle and leg; shapes back in as Ishan Kishan knocks it down the pitch

nicely played! Back of a length delivery on middle and leg; Ishan Kishan picks the length early and flicks this over backward square leg with nonchalance. Not a great line by Archer and it was punished by the batter
and now Ishan advances down the wicket; knocking this back of a length delivery towards cover-point
that's huge! A short ball by Archer; Kishan picks the bones out of it; pulling it over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. SRH owner likes it as she has a wide smile on her face
tad short outside off; Ishan Kishan steers it towards point
tad short outside off; Ishan Kishan gets cramped for room; he looks to punch this through the off-side; mistimes it though

was that a chance for the keeper? Certainly looked like it was. Travis Head tries to make room by backing away; but Nandre Burger follows him down the leg-side. Travis Head gets cramped for room and ends up getting an inside edge. The keeper dives to his right and tries to grab it; but fails to latch onto it. The ball flicks his gloves and races away to the fence

in the air; but safe! That was in the air for an eternity and Archer completely fails to judge it. Travis Head swings hard at this and miscues it over deep mid-on. Archer charges back from the circle; however; he fails to get there. It lands beyond him and Head gets away with a false shot
just clears third man! Fraction short outside off and Ishan Kishan slashes it over the fielder in the deep for a flat six
steered through backward point as the bowler goes short

on a length outside off; shaping away from the batter; Travis Head tries to carve it away through the off-side; gets beaten on the outside edge. That was really close to clipping the off-stump as well
short of a length outside off; Travis Head slaps it towards cover. Nandre Burger concedes 12 runs in the over
pitched up by the bowler from round the wicket; pushed to cover by Ishan Kishan

fraction short from round the wicket; Ishan Kishan pulls it towards wide long-on and the fielder in the deep sprints across to his left to stop it. Stretches his left arm out and flicks the ball inside; saving a couple of runs. Good fielding
another fine effort by the fielder - Donovan Ferreira again. Ishan Kishan had slapped this past the bowler and the fielder charged to his right side this time; saves two more

Ishan Kishan is off to a rollicking start. This was pitched up by the bowler; right into the slot and Ishan Kishan launches it over the bowler's head for a towering six. That was struck to perfection and it sailed into the sightscreen
looks to flick this away; miscues it over square leg for one. Didn't middle it
back of a length around off; Travis Head makes room; knocking it towards mid-off for a single
starts off with a slower delivery outside off; Travis Head squeezes it through the off-side for a single

Ishan Kishan on a roll! On a length around middle and leg; Ishan Kishan picks the length early and flicks this over mid-wicket for a boundary. There was a fielder sprinting across in the deep; but he couldn't stop it. Tushar Deshpande immediately makes a few changes in the field

in the air; but safe again! That fielder was just placed before this ball. Ishan Kishan goes for a pull against this short ball; and gets hurried due to the pace. Goes for the pull as the ball lands in front of the fielder charging in from the deep
low full toss around middle and leg; Travis Head makes room and tries to heave it away; ends up mistiming it towards mid-on

50 up for Sunrisers within the powerplay! On the shorter side outside off; Travis Head hops a touch and slaps it over covers. Gets enough elevation to clear the infield and that's a boundary for the opener
back of a length around leg; Travis Head clips it through the leg-side for one
flatter through the air on off; Travis Head punches it into the off-side for a single
advances down the wicket to squeeze this towards long-on for a single
shimmies down the wicket; drilling it towards long-on for one
they're dealing in singles following the powerplay. Riyan Parag goes full and quick; driven to long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Donovan Ferreira!! Riyan Parag strikes in his first over. Both the SRH openers are back to the pavilion. This was a rusty knock by Travis Head. HE advances down the wicket and takes the aerial route. Loses his shape in the process and ends up handing over an easy catch for Ferreira at long-on. He's not going to miss those given the standards he sets in the field. Travis Head c Donovan Ferreira b Riyan Parag 18(18) [4s-3]
event_info: out Caught by Donovan Ferreira!! Riyan Parag strikes in his first over. Both the SRH openers are back to the pavilion. This was a rusty knock by Travis Head. HE advances down the wicket and takes the aerial route. Loses his shape in the process and ends up handing over an easy catch for Ferreira at long-on. He's not going to miss those given the standards he sets in the field. Travis Head c Donovan Ferreira b Riyan Parag 18(18) [4s-3]
flatter through the air outside off; slapped through the off-side by Heinrich Klaasen
googly at the stumps; Heinrich Klaasen knocks it to long-off
tad short on middle and leg; Ishan Kishan whips it along the carpet to long-on
way too short around off; slapped to long-off for a single
short and wide outside off; slapped through covers by Ishan Kishan
quicker through the air on leg; Heinrich Klaasen whips it through mid-wicket for one
tad short on off; punched along the carpet to long-off
slight width on offer outside off; Ishan Kishan throws his hands at it; slapping it over covers for one
slight width on offer outside off; Heinrich Klaasen punches it to long-off for a single
goes full and wide outside off; that misses the tramline comfortably
Ishan Kishan moves closer to his fifty! Back of a length delivery and Ishan Kishan has deposited it over deep mid-wicket for half-a-dozen
short and wide outside off; Ishan Kishan reaches out for it somehow; slapping it through covers
short of a length outside off; Heinrich Klaasen has a swing and a miss
tad short outside off; Heinrich Klaasen slaps it to wide long-off
quicker through the air on off; slapped past the bowler for a single
fraction short outside off; Ishan Kishan slaps it powerfully; but only a single at long-off
smoked over the fielder at long-on! This was on the fuller side; Heinrich Klaasen picks the bones out of it; launching it over the boundary for half-a-dozen. Powerful wrists behind that
tad short outside off; punched through covers for one

fifty for Ishan Kishan! The skipper goes down on his knee and swings this over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. Raises his bat to acknowledge the crowd. Gets a standing ovation from the spectators and a round of applause from his teammates in the dugout
lofted to long-off on the bounce. A single to end the over as SRH are 89/2 at the halfway stage
back of a length and angling across; Kishan reaches out to cut; but the ball goes off the bottom edge towards the keeper
poor delivery; Kishan just had to find the placement; full and on the pads; Kishan flicks it off his legs to backward square leg; he just had to get some bat on it
back of a length and wide outside off; Kishan leaves it alone

another biggie; 100 up for the Sunrisers; short and on middle; Kishan gets on top of the ball nicely and swings it across the line over deep mid-wicket; Archer chased it well; but it just evaded him at the last minute
ecellent batting from Ishan here; short and outside off; Kishan stands tall and with strong wrists; slices it over to deep backward point
back of a length and outside off; Kishan slaps it to deep extra cover; the partnership between Ishan Kishan and Heinrich Klaasen is now 50
Ishan is playing a blinder of an innings; full and wide outside off; Kishan stretches to the offside; he fell over; but still gets under the ball and slices it over the fielder to third man
tossed up and outside off; Klaasen drives it down to long-off
tossed up and outside off; Kishan had shaped in for the reverse sweep and plays it to deep backward point
outside off and turning away; Klaasen stayed back and goes for the slap; but missed it completely
he doesn't miss this time! tossed up and outside off; Klaasen stays back deep in the crease; gets underneath the ball and biffs it into the stands over long on
excellent effort in the deep by Pretorious; Klaasen cuts it hard towards deep backward point; Pretorious puts in a slides and pulls it back just in time
tossed up and outside off; Kishan smashes it to deep extra cover for a couple; he got the placement
Archer is back and he's been dispatched; full and in the slot; Klaasen picks it and lofts it to long-off; once bounce and into the fence
speared in full on middle; Klaasen drvies it down to long-on
nicely bowled! Slower short delivery on the stumps; Kishan goes for the upper cut and misses it
nicely done; full and outside off; Kishan slightly opens the face of the bat and slices it to deep backward point
desperate effort by the fielder in the deep; but can't stop it; full and on middle; Kishan drills it along the ground to long-on
Ishan is dealing in fours and sixes tonight; short and on the stumps; Kishan gets on top of it and pulls it to deep mid-wicket; the deep fielder had no chance
slower-ball and well wide outside off; Heinrich Klaasen looks to fetch it from there; for the sweep; misses; called a wide
way outside off again; Heinrich Klaasen again lets it go. This is poor bowling
wide outside off; length; Heinrich Klaasen reaches for it and cuts it straight to the fielder at sweeper cover

ball_event: out Caught&Bowled!! A collision between Sandeep Sharma and Dhruv Jurel. But the catch is taken. Both were running towards the catch. Ishan Kishan shakes his head as he walks off. It's a wide length delivery outside off
event_info: he looks to pull; miscues it straight up and Sandeep just about hangs on; nearly popped out as Jurel banged into him; but he clutched it on to his stomach and held on. That's a fine innings from Ishan and he richly deserved a 100. Not to be. Massive wicket too. Breaks the momentum of the SRH side. Ishan Kishan c and b Sandeep Sharma 91(44) [4s-8 6s-6]
short of length outside off; Nitish Kumar Reddy slashes and misses; flies over the bat
fullish outside off; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward and drives straight to the fielder at extra-cover. Played with a high elbow and nicely
short of length outside off; Nitish Kumar Reddy goes on the back foot and cuts so hard; but sweeper cover gets across and cuts it off to his left
short of length outside off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward and flat-bats it powerfully but straight to the fielder at long-off
short of length outside off; angling away from the right-hander; Heinrich Klaasen fetches it from there; pulls; but it's right off the bottom of the bat and rolls to deep mid-wicket
short of length on midle; Nitish Kumar Reddy goes on the back foot and nudges it to long-on; good fielding as the man comes around to cut it off
full outside off; keeps a bit low; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to heave across the line; misses; doesn't carry to Dhruv Jurel
Heinrich Klaasen is struggling. He comes down the track and is deceived by the slower-ball angling across him; he tries to flick across the line and misses

he has just got it over Bishnoi at long-off. It's another slower-ball and full outside off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward and lofts; through the line; has power and the elevation to clear the leap of Bishnoi
short of length outside off; Heinrich Klaasen reaches for it and flat-bats it down to long-off
full outside off; just inside the tramline; left alone and that's a dot delivery
full outside off; Heinrich Klaasen gets across and sweeps that to deep mid-wicket; just one as it's straight to the fielder
smashed into the crowd at deep mid-wicket. It's an off-pace delivery; sits up and Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward and slams the pull; meaty hit. Parag is not happy
a juicy low full-toss and Nitish Kumar Reddy has missed out there. Gets forward and drives it back to Tushar Deshpande; who half-stops; they take one

ball_event: out Caught by Riyan Parag!! Straight to the fielder at extra-cover. Full and outside off
event_info: Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to loft; but doesn't have the elevation to clear Parag on the edge of the ring. He reverse-cups that near his face. Again a good contribution from Klaasen. But that's a big wicket for the South African could've caused great damage had he been there. Heinrich Klaasen c Riyan Parag b Tushar Deshpande 40(26) [4s-1 6s-3]
full outside off; Salil Arora gets forward to drive to sweeper cover; he is off the mark
1 run; angling into the pads from round the wicket; Arora misses out on the clip shot and the ball trickles off his pads
perfect yorker on middle; Reddy just manages to get some bat onto it and the ball goes off the inside edge to short fine leg
top edge; but it has gone to the boundary; well directed short delivery; the ball hurried onto him; he still went through with the pull shot and the ball goes off the top edge to fine leg
appeal for caught behind; but the ball has clearly bounced before it went to the keeper; well directed yorker just outside off; Arora digs iit out; but the ball clearly bounced onto the pitch
this is excellent death bowling from Burger; pinpoint yorker on middle; Arora just manages to dig it out
yet another yorker just outside off; Arora pushes it square of the wicket
short outside off; Arora is living a lucky life here; he goes for the slash and the ball goes off the outside edge past the keeper for a boundary
short and on the stump; Arora mistimes a pull to mid-wicket
short and Reddy has picked it perfectly; he was hanging back in the crease; gets on top of the ball nicely and absolutely smashes it over deep mid-wicket
Reddy is turning it on here; slower low full-toss; Reddy was waiting for it; picks it and launches it over long-on; the crowd goes wild
good comeback from Sharma; back of a length and wide outside off; the ball slowed down a bit and Reddy plays it to the off side
it slower short delivery outside off; Nitish goes for the slash and misses it; the ball was slightly outside the wide line and the decision is reversed; good review by Nitish

the extra ball has costed them dearly; 24 off the over; Sharma goes full this time; full-toss and in the slot; Reddy picks it and slogs it across the line over deep midwicket; much needed over for SRH; they are ending it in a high
speared in full outside off; Arora drives it down to long-off
pacy short delivery outside off; Nitish is surprised by the extra pace and bounce; leaves it alone

ball_event: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! High impact innings from Nitish comes to an end
event_info: but Archer has the last laugh; excellent bowling from him; once again digs it short just outside off; Reddy goes for a wild slog and only manages to edge it straight to the keeper. Nitish Reddy c Dhruv Jurel b Jofra Archer 28(13) [6s-4]
speared in full on middle; no room whatsoever; Verma drives it down to long-off
this is good stuff from Archer; digs it in short outside off; Arora is beaten for pace as he went for the slash
200 up for SRH; Archer goes full and he's been dispatched over long off; full and in the slot; Arora hangs back in the crease; gets under the ball nicely and launches it straight over long off
full and wide outside off; Verma goes for the slice and missed it
that has been drilled though deep extra cover; overpitched and in the slot; a juicy half-volley; Verma was up for it as he gets into the position nicely and creams it through the off side
much better from Deshpande; full and just outside off; Verma missed it completely
a shy at the non-strikers end; but no damage done; slower length delivery outside off; Verma is completely foxed by the delivery and mistimes it down the track
excellent bowling; Verma had shaped in for the lap shot; Deshpande bowls it wide outside off; Verma had to adjust his shot in the end and the ball goes off the outer half of the bat

out Aniket Verma Run Out!! A terrible mix-up in the middle; Aniket wanted the strike and sets off for a single as Arora missed out on a drive; it was a wide ball as Arora missed out on the drive; the keeper throws the ball to the bowler; who hits the stumps at the non strikers end with Aniket way short of the crease. Aniket Verma run out (Dhruv Jurel/Tushar Deshpande) 6(5) [4s-1]
poor bowling; full and wide outside off; third wide of the over
length delivery outside off; Arora is finding hard to connect the ball

Arora connects this time and has ended the innings in style; low full-toss on middle; poor delivery; Arora picks it and launches it way into the stands over deep midwicket; good end to the SRH innings
short of length and angling away from the left-hander; Yashasvi Jaiswal opens the face of the bat and glides it down to third man; off the mark

ball_event: out Caught by Salil Arora! Look at the reaction from Kavya Maran - in the SRH camp. As soon as the ball went up in the air
event_info: she was off her seat and almost praying for it to be caught. And it is. A golden duck for the baby sensation. Hard length and it rushes Vaibhav Sooryavanshi as it's at him; he wants to go hard on the pull; the ball takes the sticker of the bat and goes straight up. Salil comes forward and it is who he has the gloves; not Ishan. Takes it. And the celebrations in the SRH camp tell the whole story. They are jumping on each other. Dream start for SRH and Praful Hinge. Sooryavanshi looks at the heavens and walks off disappointed. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Salil Arora b Praful Hinge 0(1)
full outside off; Dhruv Jurel gets forward to drive and he finds cover-point

ball_event: out Bowled!! Two in the over and Praful Hinge is on cloud line. This is a length delivery just outside off
event_info: Dhruv Jurel makes the mistake of playing with an angled bat; the thick inside-edge goes back and uproots the off-stump. That hit the bat hard and forced the mistake. The crowd go mad at Uppal. Suddenly RR are 1/2. Dhruv Jurel b Praful Hinge 0(2)
beats him with a peach. A short of length delivery and rising outside off; angling away from the left-hander; Lhuan-dre Pretorius with no feet pushes at it; flies over the bat and the outside-edge

ball_event: out Caught by Nitish Reddy!! Make that three in the over. This keeps getting better and better for SRH and Praful Hinge. What a dream debut. But this is not a wicket-taking delivery. Full on the pads
event_info: flicked nicely; but straight to the fielder at deep backward square-leg. SRH can't believe their luck. Ishan is all smiles while the crowd go wild. RR in huge trouble - and just after the first over. Lhuan-dre Pretorius c Nitish Reddy b Praful Hinge 0(2)
short of length and nips back in to off; Yashasvi Jaiswal goes on the back foot and high-elbows the punch; but straight to the fielder at mid-off
short of length outside off; Yashasvi Jaiswal reaches for it to cut and mistimes it to backward point
way outside off; angling away from the left-hander; too wide and Yashasvi Jaiswal slashes and misses; called a wide
short of length outside off; Yashasvi Jaiswal goes on the back foot and cuts hard; but straight to the fielder at backward point

ball_event: out Caught by Nitish Reddy!! What do we have here? The debutants are doing it for SRH. This is a short delivery outside off
event_info: but has extra bounce; Yashasvi Jaiswal reaches for it to slash and the ball flies straight to the fielder at deep backward point. Nitish Reddy the man and it's a simple catch. Either side and he could've gotten away but the ball bounces more than he anticipated and that's him done. Things getting worse for RR and it's dreamland for SRH. Yashasvi Jaiswal c Nitish Reddy b Sakib Hussain 1(5)
full and wide outside off; Ravindra Jadeja reaches for it to drive and he finds backward point
short of length on middle; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and tucks it to deep square-leg; off the mark and it's two
short outside off; extra bounce; Riyan Parag tries to ramp and it's so close to the bat
short but way too high; outside off; left alone; wide called
nice line and length outside off; fullish; extra bounce; Riyan Parag lets it go
short of length and tight on off; Riyan Parag gets forward and gets right behind the line to defend it back
good length and tight on off; Riyan Parag gets forward to defend to cover; neatly played
classy from Riyan Parag. It's a perfectly good delivery - good length and angling into the right-hander; on off; Parag gets forward and whips it wide of mid-on; races away

ball_event: out Caught by Abhishek Sharma!! Wry smile from Riyan Parag as he walks off. Meanwhile Praful Hinge has the aeroplane out as he runs forward to celebrate. Shades of Shoaib Akhtar in that celebration. This is full and wide outside off
event_info: shapes away a tad; Parag goes for an expansive drive; no feet as it's cemented. Abhishek is at a wide slip and he takes it on the reverse-cup. Easy catch and he does some sort of celebration where he writes on an imaginary slate. Not sure who's it's directed at. Half the side back in the hut and SRH continue to rip through RR's batting. Praful Hinge has four. Riyan Parag c Abhishek Sharma b Praful Hinge 4(6) [4s-1]

almost a mix-up. On a length on middle; Ravindra Jadeja tucks to the mid-wicket pocket and wants a quick single; Donovan Ferreira is not too sure; stutters but then runs hard and makes it; would've been in even with a direct-hit
tight line and length; good length on off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to defend to cover
full on leg-stump; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to flick; the thick leading-edge loops just over the leap of the bowler. Another close shave for RR
short on off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and pulls; beats the dive of mid-wicket to his left; some respite for RR. A rare boundary s
short outside off; extra bounce; and Ravindra Jadeja wisely lets it go
short of length and tight just outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and punches with a high-elbow and back to the bowler
well-played. It's a good length delivery on middle; Ravindra Jadeja closes the face of the bat and whips it nicely; to the right of short fine; into the gap and runs away
short and down leg; rising and left alone; called a wide
full just outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to defend to cover; played with an open-face
short of length outside off and width; Donovan Ferreira reaches for it; tries to flat-bat; mistimes it to mid-off
full outside off and that's what Donovan Ferreira can do. He can smash them. He gets forward and lofts; has the elevation to go all the way over deep extra-cover
short of length outside off and tighter just outside off; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and pulls to mid-on; mistimed it
full and in the slot outside off; Donovan Ferreira will go for it; he gets forward and lofts well; well over mid-off. Putting the pressure back on SRH
good length and tight on off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to defend in front of mid-wicket. They take a quick single
SRH lose a review. Ishan knows it's too high. And he is right. On a short of length and nips back in a tad; Donovan Ferreira is beaten for pace; misses; hit on the back thigh. Going over
short of length and at the body; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and pulls to deep backward square-leg; gives the strike back to Ravindra Jadeja
full outside off; in the slot; Ravindra Jadeja takes it on; gets forward and lofts through the line; well-hit and well wide of mid-off

Eshan Malinga round the wicket. It's a length delivery on off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward and tucks it to the deep mid-wicket region. Livingstone the sub out there; he does well; slides across and keeps it to one. Donovan Ferreira is not as quick as Jadeja

that would've hurt Eshan Malinga. Hit hard on the right leg; around the knee. It's a low full-toss on off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and smashes it flat; no time for Malinga to react and he couldn't get the leg out of the way
slower-ball on off; angling into the left-hander; on middle; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and tucks it behind square on the leg-side

impact only is debatable here. This is the quicker good length delivery and it slides on to leg-stump; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to defend; misses; rapped on the pads. An appeal for LBW but it's turned down and rightly so. Ball-tracking is in and it's missing leg-stump
flat good length outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and cuts to sweeper cover
flat outside off; the googly; good length; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and flat-bats it back to Shivang Kumar
another googly; good length outside off; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and cuts; hard; the ball takes an awkward bounce for extra-cover who dives to his left; he can't stop and it's two

that's the power of Donovan Ferreira. It's a googly and on a good length just outside off; Ferreira goes on the back foot and nails the pull; well wide of long-on who had a little distance to cover but the pace on the shot beats him

Shivang Kumar round the wicket. Another googly and outside off; length; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and slashes; the thick top-edge perfectly splits backward point and short third man; runs away
way outside off; length delivery and left alone. Called a wide
short of length and angling into the left-hander around off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and nudges it in front of long-on. The call was immediately for two and two it is
full just outside off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward and shows the full face of the bat to push it to mid-off
tight good length delivery on off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and punches with a high-elbow to mid-off. Klaasen is deep and it's an easy single
short of length and tight at Donovan Ferreira; who almost goes for the pull; realises it's getting high on him; so bunts it back. Was in the air for a bit
full outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and flat-bats the drive; work for Malinga at sweeper cover and he runs across and cuts it off with a slide to his right
length delivery and angling into the right-hander on middle; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to flick to the vacant mid-wicket area
the googly and spuns away; fraction short; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and cuts to extra-cover; straight to the fielder
the googly outside off; spins away; good length and Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot to cut hard and straight to sweeper cover
flat good length outside off; spins away a tad; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and taps it to backward point
full outside off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to drive and the bat turns in the hand; lots of bottom-hand too; he finds long-on
flat good length on off; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and pulls hard but long-on keeps it to one
flat good length on middle; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and turns it towards the vacant forward short-leg area. Salil runs across but Donovan Ferreira is quick
way outside off; flat; Ravindra Jadeja reaches for it to cut and misses; called a wide
flat good length on middle; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-off
good length and flat just outside off; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and cuts hard and straight to deep extra-cover
quick and it turns in from outside off; no room for Ravindra Jadeja to dab that; but he tries and the ball takes a thick inside-edge and goes to the left of Salil
way outside off; past the tramline; left alone and wide taken. Salil wants a review but Ishan doesn't go for it
fired full on the pads; flicked to deep square-leg and it's in the gap; they take two
fired full on off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to drive and he finds long-on for one. No timing on that
slower and tossed up full outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and flat-bats the drive; beats the dive of cover-point but there's cover back

tossed up full and in the slot outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to loft and misses; Salil fails to glove it properly. Hang on - there's an outside-edge as UltraEdge spots it. It will go down as a drop. Tough chance and it hit the gloves and went away. There was a deflection and UltraEdge picked up the spike
this time Donovan Ferreira doesn't miss. It's full on off; in the slot; he gets forward and muscles the loft; flat hit over long-off for six. Was another googly. Into the SRH dugout

smashed back at Shivang Kumar and that's a hard chance. Doesn't stick. It's tossed up and full around off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and slams it; just flicked the left hand as Shivang stretched it
way too much flight and full outside off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to drill it hard and straight to long-off
Donovan Ferreira is putting the bad ball away. It's dragged down on off; Ferreira has the time to rock back and pulls so hard; one bounce over the ropes and wide of deep mid-wicket
short and outside off; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and pulls to long-on
slower and the length held back outside off; Donovan Ferreira looks to slash and misses. Bit of extra bounce

so quick he is off the back foot. It's a flat good length delivery on middle; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and pulls; no mid-wicket and he splits deep mid-wicket and long-on to perfection. So much power

and now it's short outside off; Donovan Ferreira reaches 50. He raises his bat. Goes on the back foot; slaps the cut and beats point to his right; Abhishek at deep extra-cover runs and dives to his left but the ball wins
this is a monster. On a length and tossed up; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and mows it 102m into the stands at deep mid-wicket. That was one brutal hit. The ball sails way back into the crowd
flat and quick; on a good length outside off; Donovan Ferreira goes on the back foot and cuts; but picks out backward point
fired full on off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to drive it back to Harsh Dubey. Two dots to end
slower-ball and full and wide outside off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward and drives wide of extra-cover. Long-off gets across and cuts it off to his right
hard pull and beats the run and dive of deep mid-wicket to his right. It's short outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and pulls so hard. Sakib Hussain the man

a direct-hit from Malinga from backward point but Ravindra Jadeja is in. Then the ball ricochets off the stumps away; then they run. A slower-ball on a good length outside off; Jadeja cuts and he is sent back
slower-ball and on a good length outside off; Donovan Ferreira mows across the line and misses; it kept a bit low

Nitish Kumar Reddy is not hapy with that throw from Ishan. Sooryavanshi is off his seat and clapping. A slower-ball and almost yorker length outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to drive to extra-cover. Ravindra Jadeja is sent back and there was half a chance of a run-out; that's why Ishan throws. Deep mid-wicket and deep backward square-leg both go for it; the latter dives to his left but the ball slips away and touches the cushions. Nitish gesturing to Ishan as to why he threw it
slower-ball off-cutter and full outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward to loft; it catches the thick inside-edge and runs away to deep backward square-leg

1 run; it tails in late; Donovan Ferreira clears his front leg to heave; misses; rapped on the back leg; with the amount of tail back in; would've missed leg-stump. The ump stays quiet despite an appeal and there's no review from SRH. Also since the impact was on the back leg; did it strike him in line?
slower-ball off-cutter and on a good length outside off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to cut; mistimes it towards mid-off
slower-ball off-cutter on a good length outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and tries to flat-bat; but mistimes it towards long-off
low full-toss on middle and off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to flick between deep mid-wicket and long-on. Easy two
slower-ball and into the pitch; loops over Ravindra Jadeja and well wide outside off; called wide for height
slower-ball off-cutter and wide outside off; Ravindra Jadeja reaches for it and slaps it hard; wide of extra-cover and beats Klaasen running across to his right from long-off
low full-toss on leg-stump; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward and flicks straight to the fielder at deep backward square-leg; retains the strike with that run
full on off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward and drives it into the ground; beats the outstretched right hand of Sakib Hussain; rolls away for one
beautiful slower-ball and it has totally deceived Donovan Ferreira. He is early into the shot and the ball flies over off-stump
pace-on and seam-up. Full outside off; Donovan Ferreira can't square-drive; under the bat and that's a good delivery
beastly hit. Full and in the slot outside off; Donovan Ferreira gets forward and smashes it with so much power; wide of extra-cover and it bullets away to the fence

fine effort from Sakib Hussain running back and then diving forward with an outstretched right hand. But the ball just misses his hand. It's a slower-ball off-cutter on a good length outside off; Donovan Ferreira goes across the line; hits the bat high and it's in the air. Ferreira lucky to get away with that

ball_event: out Bowled!! Sakib Hussain gets his man. Ishan goes up and hugs him. It's also the timeout. A clever slower-ball and it's the off-cutter
event_info: spins in sharply; Donovan Ferreira goes for a mow across the line; misses; flicks the back leg and falls on the stumps. Crucial wicket that. Ferreira could've been deadly dangerous at the death and he was hitting the ball so well too. Donovan Ferreira b Sakib Hussain 69(44) [4s-7 6s-3]
slower-ball off-cutter and wide outside off; Ravindra Jadeja reaches for it to cut and it's one to sweeper cover
low full-toss and angling into the right-hander on middle; Jofra Archer gets forward to drive to long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Salil Arora!! Clear spike on UltraEdge. And Salil knew it. That's why he told Ishan to take the review. It's a short of length delivery and across Ravindra Jadeja who looks to cut late
event_info: the bottom-edge is found and that's a simple catch. Jayaraman Madanagopal didn't give it and he has to overturn the original call. Ravindra Jadeja c Salil Arora b Eshan Malinga 45(32) [4s-5]
short of length and into the body; angling into the left-hander; Tushar Deshpande goes on the back foot and defends it to the left of Eshan Malinga
low full-toss and on middle; Tushar Deshpande gets forward and flicks wide of long-on. Easy two
what a blow. That's a slower-ball off-cutter and full in the slot on off; Tushar Deshpande gets forward and lofts so well; flies over the sightscreen. Held the pose too
yorker length and shapes away a tad outside off; Jofra Archer gets forward to drive and misses; under the bat
beautiful slower-ball and it's on off; the off-cutter and Jofra Archer is way too early into the leg-side mow; misses and the ball flies over the stumps
low full-toss on off; Jofra Archer gets forward to drive wide of extra-cover and they take a quick single
full on middle; Tushar Deshpande gets forward to loft; it's on the bounce to long-on
slower-ball off-cutter and down leg; Jofra Archer flicks and misses. Ishan is not happy with Sakib Hussain; immediately goes to him to have a chat

ball_event: out Caught by Praful Hinge!! The two debutants combine. Premeditated from Jofra Archer and way too early. A slower-ball off-cutter and full outside off
event_info: Archer telegraphs the reverse-lap and he picks out short third man. Hinge moves to his left and takes it. That looped to him. The end is near. Jofra Archer c Praful Hinge b Sakib Hussain 2(5)

ball_event: out Caught by Ishan Kishan!! Two in two and Sakib Hussain is so happy. He points at Ishan to take it and the skipper doesn't drop it from extra-cover. It's a slower-ball off-cutter again. It's full outside off
event_info: Ravi Bishnoi gets forward to loft and the bat turns on impact; it's totally miscued and Ishan completes the rest. Sakib ends with 4/24. What a debut. He is pumped as he punches the air and roars in delight. Ravi Bishnoi c Ishan Kishan b Sakib Hussain 0(1)
short of length and it's thumped by Tushar Deshpande. He goes on the back foot and pulls so well; flies over deep mid-wicket. This Deshpande can bat. That's some shot
good yorker on off; tails back in; Tushar Deshpande gets forward to drive and the thick inside-edge goes to deep backward square-leg
slower-ball and extra bounce outside off; and it's short; Nandre Burger is on his tiptoes; tries to glide it down; misses; doesn't carry to Salil
slower-ball and on a good length on off; the off-cutter and Nandre Burger is happy to nudge a single to the vacant mid-wicket area
Praful Hinge nails the yorker on middle; dug out to deep mid-wicket and they take two. That's good running

into the top-tier over wide long-on. And some 10 rows back too. A slower-ball off-cutter and it sits in the pitch on off; Tushar Deshpande shows his batting prowess with a mighty pull as he gets forward; such a clean strike and Praful Hinge is being applauded by Kavya Maran and the others in the SRH camp
beautiful yorker and no room for Nandre Burger; on middle-stump; he digs it out back
slower-ball off-cutter on a short of length on middle; Nandre Burger goes on the back foot and punches it wide of extra-cover
slower-ball off-cutter and angling away from the left-hander; keeps a bit low; Tushar Deshpande slogs and misses. He checks with Nandre Burger whether it's a wide; then gets the response and nods
fine yorker on off; Tushar Deshpande digs it out to deep backward square-leg; he didn't bother to get in line
Eshan Malinga round the wicket. It's a short of length delivery on off; Burger goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Ishan Kishan!! SRH end the unbeaten record of RR. Kavya Maran is all smiles and gives a thumbs up to someone. They are checking for the height on this. But it's nowhere near the waist. It's a fair delivery. A low full-toss on middle
event_info: shapes away a tad; Tushar Deshpande gets forward to loft and miscues it; goes straight up and Ishan won't drop that extra-cover. A thumping win too for SRH as they win by 57 runs. Tushar Deshpande c Ishan Kishan b Eshan Malinga 25(11) [6s-3]
